title: 2025 Recap
description: 2025 was a year of growth and transformation, marked by key milestones and valuable lessons. This recap highlights the moments that defined the year
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const o={blockquote:"blockquote",p:"p",...a.components},{Image:r}=o;return r||function(e,t){throw new Error("Expected "+(t?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}("Image",!0),n(e,{children:[t(o.p,{children:"Looking back at 2025, it's been a year of transformation in so many ways. This was the year I truly embraced the mindset of"}),"
",n(o.blockquote,{children:["
",t(o.p,{children:"Focus on yourself"}),"
"]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"and as I reflect on the past months, I realize just how much I've grown, both personally and professionally. It's been a year of steady progress, building upon the hard work I put in during 2024, and while not everything went perfectly, I'm proud of what I've achieved."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"A major highlight of this year was starting a new job at a new company. It was a huge change, and one that brought its fair share of challenges. However, it's been such a rewarding experience. I've learned so much already, and I'm excited to see where this journey will take me. It's been a refreshing change that's pushed me to grow in ways I didn't expect, and I'm really looking forward to what's to come."}),"
",t(r,{src:"/assets/articles/retro/2025/2025-year-end-party.png"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"This year, I also made a conscious effort to travel more. I visited Binh Hung Island and Da Lat, and both trips gave me the chance to slow down, enjoy new experiences, and recharge my batteries. There's something about stepping away from the daily grind and immersing yourself in nature that brings so much clarity. These trips reminded me to appreciate the simple things, and I came back feeling more grounded and inspired."}),"
",n("div",{className:"flex flex-col gap-2 md:flex-row",children:[t(r,{style:{width:600,height:600},src:"/assets/articles/retro/2025/2025-da-lat-01.png",alt:"DaLat"}),t(r,{style:{width:600,height:600},src:"/assets/articles/retro/2025/2025-binh-hung-01.png",alt:"BinhHung"})]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"One of the most exciting personal projects this year was launching my new blog. It was something I'd been wanting to do for a long time, and finally taking the leap felt like a huge step forward. While the blog is still in its early stages, I'm proud of the progress I've made. It's been a platform for self-expression, a place where I can share my thoughts and experiences. I look forward to growing it even more in the future."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"But of course, it hasn't been all smooth sailing. There are areas where I still need to improve. For instance, I struggled with commitment in some areas. There were several projects I started but didn't finish, and I didn't read as many books as I had hoped. I still have a lot to work on, but that's okay. It's part of the process."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"One thing I'm particularly proud of this year is my commitment to fitness. I made it a point to go to the gym consistently, and I'm happy to say I stuck to it. I've noticed a huge difference in my energy levels, my mindset, and even my mood. Regular exercise has become a key part of my routine, and it's something I plan to continue as part of my self-care."}),"
",t(r,{style:{height:700},src:"/assets/articles/retro/2025/2025-gym.png"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Looking ahead, I have a clear goal for 2026 🎯"}),"
",n(o.blockquote,{children:["
",t(o.p,{children:"Finish what you started"}),"
"]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"I want to close the chapters that are still open, finish the projects that have been left incomplete, and clean up the loose ends. I want to make 2026 a year of completion and clarity, so I can enter 2027 with a fresh perspective and a solid foundation."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"2025 has been a year of progress—personally, professionally, and physically. I've focused on myself, reflected on where I am, and made plans for the future. I'm excited for the year ahead, and I'm ready to finish strong and make 2026 even better. Here's to building on everything I've started and embracing the next chapter of growth!"})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: New Job, New Beginnings 🚀

title: Blog v2 - Rebuilding My Online Home 🌟

title: 2026 Recap
description: 2026 was a year of growth and transformation, marked by key milestones and valuable lessons. This recap highlights the moments that defined the year
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const i={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",h2:"h2",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...a.components},{VideoZoom:r}=i;return r||function(e,t){throw new Error("Expected "+(t?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}("VideoZoom",!0),n(e,{children:[t(i.p,{children:"The first four months of 2026 have already passed, and yet this year still feels like it is only just beginning."}),"
",n(i.p,{children:["My theme for the year is simple: ",t(i.strong,{children:t(i.code,{children:"finish what I started"})})," and continue doing what I've always done."]}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"A simple sentence, but not always a simple thing to live by. I came into this year with that intention quietly sitting in the back of my mind, like a promise I made to myself and kept postponing. And if I am being honest, by the end of March, I still have not really begun the way I hoped I would."}),"
",t(i.h2,{id:"january---february",children:t(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#january---february",children:"January - February"})}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"January and February slipped away in the familiar rhythm of preparing for Tết. Busy, scattered, full of small tasks and family moments — the kind of months that move quickly without asking for permission."}),"
",t(i.h2,{id:"march",children:t(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#march",children:"March"})}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"Then came March, unfolding in a gentler tone."}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"March also gave me a moment worth remembering: on March 8, I attended several Dharma talks by master Giác Nguyên at Siêu Lý pagoda in District 6. It wasn't loud or dramatic, but it left a peaceful imprint on me — the kind of quiet grounding I didn't realize I needed."}),"
",t(r,{src:"/assets/articles/retro/2026/su-giac-nguyen-2026.mp4",width:400,height:400,className:"aspect-square w-full object-cover rounded-md border",onLoadedMetadata:e=>{e.target.volume=.2},style:{width:"300px",height:"500px"},description:"A peaceful moment at Siêu Lý pagoda"}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"I took a peaceful, memorable trip to Đà Lạt with my girlfriend — a few days wrapped in cool air, quiet streets, and the softness that only Đà Lạt seems to hold. It was the kind of trip that slows you down just enough to reflect, to breathe, to feel your life a little more clearly. A small escape, but a meaningful one."}),"
",t(i.h2,{id:"april",children:t(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#april",children:"April"})}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"And then April arrived."}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"On April 7, I bought myself a chair for my workspace 🪑— something I had dreamed of for years, ever since I owned my very first PC. It may sound like a small thing to some people, but to me it felt like a milestone. A simple chair, yes, but also a reminder that dreams do not always arrive all at once. Sometimes they show up as practical, ordinary things after years of waiting."}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"There are still unfinished projects from past years. There are new ideas waiting to be shaped into something real. There is still a version of me that I have not fully become yet. But instead of treating that as a reason to feel behind, I want to treat it as a reason to keep going. So this is me, at the start of April, choosing motion over hesitation. Choosing consistency over pressure. Choosing to move forward, even if the pace is slow."}),"
",t(i.p,{children:t(i.strong,{children:t(i.em,{children:"By the end of this year, when I come back to the last line of this post, I want to see a checklist that tells a different story — one with more checkmarks than excuses."})})}),"
",n(i.ul,{children:["
",t(i.li,{children:"A checklist of unfinished projects finally completed."}),"
",t(i.li,{children:"A checklist of new projects that actually got started."}),"
",t(i.li,{children:"A checklist of progress, discipline, and quiet persistence."}),"
"]}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"I started. I kept going. And I finished what I started 🎯"})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: 2024 Recap
description: 2024 was a year of quiet realization. A year where I learned to slow down, reflect, and understand why focusing on myself mattered more than anything else.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const o={blockquote:"blockquote",em:"em",p:"p",strong:"strong",...a.components};return n(e,{children:[t(o.p,{children:"2024: The year I learned to grow in silence:"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Looking back at 2024, I see it as a quiet year — not loud, not flashy, but deeply important. It wasn't filled with dramatic breakthroughs or visible achievements. Instead, it was the year I learned to build myself in silence, to stop chasing noise, and to understand one simple lesson:"}),"
",n(o.blockquote,{children:["
",t(o.p,{children:"Focus on yourself"}),"
"]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Throughout 2024, I spent a lot of energy trying to meet expectations, juggling too many directions at once, and worrying about outcomes I couldn't control. I often looked busy, but inside I wasn't always at peace. That year taught me that real growth doesn't always come from doing more — sometimes it comes from stepping back and choosing what truly matters."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"It was also the year I noticed how scattered my focus had become. I started things without clarity, chased momentum without purpose, and measured progress through external validation rather than inner alignment. The realization wasn't comfortable, but it was honest — and it became the turning point."}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["By the end of 2024, I didn't have everything figured out. I didn't close every chapter or finish every plan. But I gained something far more valuable than quick wins: ",t(o.strong,{children:"direction"}),". I began to understand that before building bigger goals, careers, or projects, I needed a stronger foundation — mentally, emotionally, and physically."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"2024 didn't demand a spotlight. It asked for patience."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"It was the year of rebuilding — quietly showing up, quietly learning, quietly becoming. A seed was planted, and even though growth wasn't always visible, it was happening."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Looking ahead:"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["If 2024 was the year I learned ",t(o.em,{children:"how"})," to focus and grow in silence, then 2025 became the year I started to ",t(o.strong,{children:"harvest"})," — turning that inner work into real momentum, real habits, and real change."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"The lessons of 2024 didn't end there — they carried forward and shaped the decisions that defined the next chapter."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: When Self-Work Became the Real Work
description: The year I finally understood why working on myself matters more than working on my job.
body: const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:o}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(n){const r={p:"p",...n.components},{RoughMark:a}=r;return a||function(e,t){throw new Error("Expected "+(t?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}("RoughMark",!0),o(e,{children:[t(r.p,{children:"In 2024, Jim Rohn's line finally hit me for real:"}),"\n",t(a,{type:"highlight",multiline:!0,color:"#ffe066",children:t("span",{style:{color:"#000"},children:"Learn to work harder on yourself than you do on your job. If you work hard on your job you can make a living, but if you work hard on yourself you'll make a fortune."})}),"\n",t(r.p,{children:'Until then, I mostly treated "self-improvement" like a nice-to-have, something I\'d do when I had time. This was the year I started to see my mind, my skills, and my habits as the real assets — not the job title on my profile. It changed how I spent my evenings, what I paid attention to, and what I expected from my future self.'})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:o}=e.components||{};return o?t(o,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Outgrowing My Old Job
description: The year I admitted my old company no longer fit and bet on my own growth instead.
body: const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const r={p:"p",...o.components};return n(e,{children:[t(r.p,{children:"2024 was the year I finally admitted it to myself: my old company wasn't the problem, it just wasn't the right fit for who I was becoming. I had outgrown the role, the pace, and the way things were done there."}),"\n",t(r.p,{children:"Instead of complaining, I decided to shift my focus inward — to study properly, to stop half-learning, and to pour my energy into personal projects. The first real result of that decision was my original personal blog, a tiny website that somehow opened the door to my current job and eventually evolved into this version 2 you're reading now. It wasn't a clean break or a heroic moment, just a quiet decision to take myself more seriously."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
